title: flowguard_plan
description: Submit a plan OR record an independent review verdict. Mode A: provide planText. Mode B: provide reviewVerdict with reviewFindings.

planText.description: Plan body text (markdown). Required for Mode A and when reviewVerdict is 'changes_requested'.

reviewVerdict.description: Independent review verdict. Omit for initial plan submission.

reviewFindings.description: Structured review findings from independent review.

reviewerUnavailable.description: Set to true when the reviewer subagent cannot be invoked.

ReviewFindings.description: Structured findings from the flowguard-reviewer subagent.
